scripts.test:logic: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path '.tmp-test') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.tmp-test' }; npx tsc --ignoreConfig --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --outDir .tmp-test --module commonjs --target es2020 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --jsx react-native lib/planIntake.ts; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node --test tests/planIntake.test.js"
